title: Stats daily shows a clear empty state
description: Black-box smoke for `orca stats daily` when no usage data exists yet.
input: Run `orca stats daily` in an isolated empty ORCA_HOME and verify the command prints the empty-state message instead of crashing.
command: bash -lc 'REPO_ROOT=${PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}; cd "$REPO_ROOT"; bash agent-eval/scripts/prepare-fast-gate.sh >/dev/null; TMP_HOME=$(mktemp -d); trap "rm -rf $TMP_HOME" EXIT; mkdir -p "$TMP_HOME/.orca"; env -i PATH="$PATH" HOME="$TMP_HOME" ORCA_HOME="$TMP_HOME/.orca" node dist/bin/orca.js stats daily'
